channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DOJ Faces Questions After Epstein-Related Record Briefly Disappears From Public Database
item.description: The article examines controversy surrounding the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) after a record connected to the Jeffrey Epstein case briefly disappeared from a public database before being restored....

item.title: Practical Strategies for Combining Comfort and Style in Home Design
item.description: This article explores how to harmonize aesthetics and functionality in home design by prioritizing comfort alongside visual appeal. It emphasizes the importance of understanding how people experience ...

item.title: Russia Links Attempted Assassination of General Alexeiev to International Involvement
item.description: On February 6, 2026, an attempt was made on the life of Russian General Vladimir Alexeiev, who was shot multiple times but survived after being hospitalized and undergoing surgery. Russian authorities...

item.title: Investigation Alleges Israeli Forces Shot and Killed 15 Gaza Aid Workers During March 2025 Operation
item.description: A joint investigation by the research groups Earshot and Forensic Architecture alleges that Israeli soldiers killed 15 Palestinian aid workers in Tel al-Sultan, southern Gaza, on March 23, 2025. Accor...

item.title: Artemis II Launch Postponed to April Due to Helium System Issue
item.description: The launch of Artemis II, NASA’s second mission in the Artemis program, has been postponed to at least April 2026 due to an issue with the helium pressurization system on the rocket's ICPS second stag...

item.title: Computational Study Finds 40,000-Year-Old Stone Age Sign Sequences Comparable in Complexity to Proto-Cuneiform
item.description: A new study by linguist Christian Bentz of Saarland University and archaeologist Ewa Dutkiewicz from the Museum of Prehistory and Early History in Berlin suggests that sign sequences carved into Stone...

item.title: Media Manipulation in the Ukraine War: Glenn Diesen at the UN Security Council
item.description: This video features Glenn Diesen, a researcher, presenting at the UN Security Council. He analyzes how media coverage of the Ukraine war may be biased and used to shape public perception, emphasizing ...

item.title: Weekly Highlights from Moss & Fog: Art, Design, and Nature
item.description: This week, Moss & Fog’s Fog Signals roundup highlights a diverse mix of visually striking and creative content. Among the most popular posts, a photographer captured an incredible meteor streaking int...

item.title: Drone Warfare and Electronic Networks Reshape the Front Lines in Ukraine
item.description: The article describes how the war in Ukraine has transformed into a highly technological and electronically driven conflict, where drones and communication networks dominate the battlefield. The front...

item.title: A Geological Exploration of Eight Remarkable Gemstones and Their Natural Origins
item.description: The article explores eight extraordinary gemstones formed through natural geological processes over millions or even billions of years. It emphasizes that their beauty is not intentional, but rather t...

item.title: Exploring the Emotional Depth of AI-Generated Vaporwave Portraits
item.description: Byone Lab is an innovative AI art project that transforms imperfections in reality into captivating visual experiences. Its videos simulate the feel of broadcast signals capturing unintended moments, ...

item.title: 50 Cent Continues Social Media Feud with T.I. by Targeting King and Tiny Harris
item.description: Rapper 50 Cent has once again ignited controversy on social media after posting comments aimed at King Harris, the son of fellow rapper T.I., and his mother, Tameka “Tiny” Harris. The incident stems f...

item.title: Mercedes-Benz Launches a Master-Planned Residential Community in Dubai
item.description: Mercedes-Benz, in collaboration with luxury developer Binghatti, is creating an ambitious new project in Dubai called Mercedes-Benz Places Binghatti City. Envisioned as a 'city within a city,' the dev...

item.title: Alleged Use of Starlink Terminals in Iran and U.S. Covert Operations
item.description: A recent article claims that the United States supplied thousands of Starlink satellite terminals to Iran with the alleged goal of circumventing censorship and supporting anti-government actors. Accor...

item.title: A Unified Geopolitical Conflict Linking Iran, Ukraine, and Venezuela
item.description: The article argues that the conflicts surrounding Iran, Ukraine, and Venezuela are not isolated crises but rather interconnected fronts of a broader geopolitical struggle. According to the author, thi...

item.title: Google Patches Actively Exploited Chrome Zero-Day (CVE-2026–2441) in CSS Font Processing
item.description: Google has released an emergency security update to address CVE-2026–2441, the first Chrome zero-day vulnerability reported in 2026. The flaw, rated high severity with a CVSS score of 8.8, was discove...

item.title: Bernie Sanders urges urgent action on AI revolution, warns of unpreparedness in the US
item.description: Bernie Sanders has raised concerns about the lack of preparedness in the US regarding the rapid advancement of AI technologies. After meeting with tech leaders in California, Sanders called for immedi...

item.title: Why Total Screen Luminance Matters More Than Blue Light Filters for Sleep
item.description: In this article, visual neuroscientist Patrick Mineault argues that blue light filters, such as Apple’s Night Shift or apps like f.lux, are largely ineffective at improving sleep. While the common bel...

item.title: Serbia Rebalances Its Foreign Policy Amid Western Pressure and Strained Ties with Russia
item.description: The article examines what it describes as a significant shift in Serbia’s foreign policy, arguing that Belgrade is gradually moving away from Russia under pressure from the European Union and the Unit...

item.title: Gisele Bündchen Seen Wearing Wedding Ring During Bike Ride Amid Ongoing Attention on Tom Brady’s Dating Life
item.description: Gisele Bündchen was recently spotted enjoying a quiet bike ride with her youngest son in Florida, drawing attention as she appeared relaxed and unbothered amid renewed public interest in her ex-husban...
